svg.title: Component Diagram - Delivery Platform System (v4.0 - Final)

g.text: Component Diagram - Delivery Platform System (v4.0 - Final)
All services write audit logs via ClientSvc.
get rider info, update carried cash
update status, get shop closing times
get shop operational status, find alternative shop
get base hours, max cash limit
get eligible customers and profit contributions
consume OrderStatusChanged, PaymentCompleted, ComplaintAccepted, RiderApproved, etc.
